# Anti-Pattern Templates

Load only the file relevant to the current task.

- `no-as-const-variables.md`
- `no-anonymous-functions.md`
- `no-use-callback-by-default.md`
- `no-render-functions.md`
- `no-nested-array-pipelines.md`
- `no-component-loops.md`
- `no-tests-for-components-or-functions.md`
